section_name: Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway
text:
(a) The portion of State Highway 173 in Bandera County from the south end of the bridge crossing the Medina River in the city of Bandera to the Medina County line is designated as the Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(40), eff. September 1, 2023.

Sec. 225.204. SECOND LIEUTENANT LLOYD “PETE” HUGHES MEDAL OF HONOR MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) The portion of U.S. Highway 77 in Refugio County is designated as the Second Lieutenant Lloyd “Pete” Hughes Medal of Honor Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Second Lieutenant Lloyd “Pete” Hughes Medal of Honor Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(41), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.203 — Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of State Highway 173 in Bandera County from the south end of the bridge crossing the Medina River in the city of Bandera to the Medina County line is designated as the Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Master Sergeant Rodney Lee Buentello Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(40), eff. September 1, 2023.

Sec. 225.204. SECOND LIEUTENANT LLOYD “PETE” HUGHES MEDAL OF HONOR MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) The portion of U.S. Highway 77 in Refugio County is designated as the Second Lieutenant Lloyd “Pete” Hughes Medal of Honor Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Second Lieutenant Lloyd “Pete” Hughes Medal of Honor Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(41), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 266 (H.B.2167), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*
